name: Merlin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>伝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>説</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>預</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>言</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マーリン
desc:
You can only use each effect of "Merlin" once per turn.
● You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Noble Knight" monster from your Deck. You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except "Noble Knight" monsters.
● (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your GY; immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 "Noble Knight" Synchro Monster using monsters you control.
● (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your GY; immediately after this effect resolves, Xyz Summon 1 "Noble Knight" Xyz Monster using monsters you control.

sets.set: Noble Knights of the Round Table Box Set

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
